ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "department_head_id" INTEGER /* Head of the department */,
  "department_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the department */,
  "department_email" TEXT /* Email of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "program_head_id" INTEGER /* Head of the program */,
  "program_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the employee */,
  "contact" TEXT /* Contact number of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "contact" TEXT /* Contact number of the student */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of origin of the student */,
  "city_of_origin" TEXT /* City of origin of the student */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the student is affiliated with */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program the student is enrolled in */,
  "year_of_study" INTEGER /* Year of study of the student */,
  "student_email" TEXT /* Email of the student */,
  "student_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "student_advisor_id" INTEGER /* Advisor of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_student_advisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_advisor_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student being enrolled */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the student is enrolling in */,
  "year_of_study" INTEGER /* Year of study of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student was enrolled */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the student completed the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_enrollments" (
  "course_enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course enrollment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolling in */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student being enrolled */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade of the student in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
